title: Nuclear Winter
description: mod that tries to generate a post nuclear environment
body:
This mod tries to generate in Minecraft the atmosphere of a post-nuclear world, with structures, biome blocks, etc. This mod is exclusive to version 1.20.1 of Minecraft and requires geckolib for its operation. Thank you very much for taking the time to read the description.

current features:
-----------------------------------------------
4biomes:

wasteland
rad ocean
ash forest
mojave desert

-----------------------------------------------

3Weapons/tools:

long axe

stone combat hammer

combat knife

-----------------------------------------------

4 new blocks:

rad stone
blazetite
mojave cactus
ashwood
-----------------------------------------------

1mob:
mutant creeper


If you want to make a world or server with a post apocalyptic theme you can give this mod a try and I will try to give you more content soon.
